item.title: Nick_Metcalfe: Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 33min Good evening. @philhaigh_ and I are in Sheffield for one of sport's great events.
item.description:
Nick Metcalfe @Nick_Metcalfe · 33min Good evening. @philhaigh_ and I are in Sheffield for one of sport's great events.
Thank you to our various guests - @RoddyBisset , @_ShaneMacD and @robwalkertv - as we look ahead to the World Championship.
Reflections too on the John Virgo Memorial. open.spotify.com Talking Snooker Episode 249 - LIVE FROM SHEFFIELD: World Championship 2026 Preview Talking Snooker · Episode 2 5 167
